title: Ancient bricks floating on water found in Talegaon Dashasar Village of Amravati Maharashtra
description: अमरावती जिले के तलेगांव दशासर के लोग इन्हें 'खंगारी ईंट' कहते हैं जो सदियों पहले के कारीगरों की वैज्ञानिक समझ का जीता-जागता सबूत हैं.

title: Ancient Ground Squirrel DNA Reveals Mammoth-Eating Diet
description: Analysis of 700,000-year-old fossilized squirrel droppings uncovers a previously unknown lineage of ground squirrels that consumed a diverse diet including plants, insects, and megafauna like woolly mammoths, bison, and big cats. The research, potentially containing North America's oldest mammoth DNA, highlights how these hibernators adapted to post-hibernation protein needs. Discovery aided by gold-mining techniques exposing permafrost burrows in Canada's Yukon, offering a genetic archive of Pleistocene ecosystems.

title: An Almost Incomparable ‘Princely’ Tomb of Ancient Celtic Noble Found in Germany
description: A “princely grave” with Celtic connections has been found during construction in Germany. Found in Bad Camburg in the German state of Hesse, the assemblage of gold, armaments, and the iron wagon fittings elevate the discovery to one which has but 2 comparable examples in the whole of the country. This, say experts at the [...] The post An Almost Incomparable ‘Princely’ Tomb of Ancient Celtic Noble Found in Germany appeared first on Good News Network .

title: Exceptionally Well-Preserved 160-Million-Year-Old Fossil Feathers Reveal These Winged Dinosaurs Probably Couldn't Fly
description: A remarkable set of fossil feathers revealed an unexpected pattern. Hidden within the ancient plumage was a clue that had remained unnoticed for 160 million years.
